title: Antiques for sale | eBay
notes: Official eBay Antiques category marketplace - one of the hottest, most profitable categories on eBay in 2026 with numerous subcategories including Architectural & Garden, Asian Antiques, Furniture, Silver, Rugs & Carpets, Maritime, and Decorative Arts

title: eBay App | eBay.com
notes: eBay mobile app promotion offering $10 off in-app QR code promotions and exclusive app-only deals, downloaded 410 million times with 260K downloads per day

title: Item Q&A | Seller Center
notes: Questions & Answers feature that enables shoppers to ask sellers and recent buyers questions about products, with answers featured on listings visible to all future buyers

title: WatchedItemEndingSoon | eBay Developers Program
notes: Notification system that alerts buyers when watched auction items are ending soon (typically 14 minutes before end time), with support for email and push notifications via mobile app

title: Selling through auctions | eBay
notes: Auction format where buyers bid on items with durations of 1, 3, 5, 7, or 10 days, with optional Buy It Now and reserve price features

title: Selling through auctions
notes: International version of auction-style listings available across eBay's global marketplaces

title: Augmented Reality? Now It's a Reality with eBay's New Shipping Tool
notes: AR tool built on Google's ARCore platform that helps sellers find the right shipping box by placing virtual boxes over real items using motion tracking and environmental understanding

title: How to Set up Two-Factor Authentication on eBay
notes: Two-factor authentication using third-party authenticator apps (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, or Authy) for enhanced account security with time-based one-time passcodes

title: Buying with Authenticity Guarantee | eBay
notes: Search filter for finding items eligible for professional authentication, displaying blue checkmark badge on listings for watches ($2,000+), handbags ($500+), sneakers ($75+), jewelry, streetwear, and trading cards

title: eBay Authenticity Guarantee
notes: Global authentication program with expert physical inspection for luxury items across multiple categories and markets before shipping to buyers

title: eBay Authenticity Guarantee for Streetwear
notes: Authentication service launched June 2023 for streetwear items $200+ from brands like Aimé Leon Dore, Fear of God, KITH, Supreme, Off-White, Palace, Stone Island, Nike, adidas, Gucci, Prada, and Louis Vuitton

title: eBay Launches Another Program that Puts Branded Sellers Front and Center
notes: Search filter for finding Authorized Retailer and Certified by Brand sellers, displaying blue badge and manufacturer logo in search results for verified brand-authorized sellers

title: eBay Repricer Guide: How to Compete and Win in 2026
notes: Dynamic repricing tools that automatically adjust listing prices based on competition, market trends, and seller performance parameters, with AI-powered algorithms increasing sales by 15-30%

title: Relisting items | eBay
notes: Automatic relisting feature where auction items (1 or 3 days) are relisted up to 8 times as 7-day listings, and fixed-price listings are set to Good 'Til Cancelled with automatic monthly relisting

title: How to relist items
notes: Feature that automatically relists unsold items, with fixed-price listings renewing every 30 days and auction items relisting up to 8 times

title: Shipped order and it's still showing as awaiting shipment
notes: Order status shown when seller has been paid and needs to ship item, sometimes causing technical display issues where shipped items appear in awaiting shipment section

title: Back in-stock notifications for buyers
notes: Limited notification feature where some listings display 'Get Notified When Available' button for buyers to receive email alerts when out-of-stock items become available again

title: Back to School Sale - eBay
notes: Annual August promotional event with discounts up to 70% on tech gadgets, 50% on school supplies, and 65% on clothing and footwear, with laptops and tablets averaging 25-35% off

title: Seller performance overview | eBay
notes: Seller performance level indicating performance below eBay minimum standards, resulting in 6% surcharge on standard fees, blocked Promoted Listings, and potential funds holds until improvement

title: Securing the top spot in search rankings: Understanding eBay's Cassini algorithm
notes: eBay's core search engine algorithm that ranks listings based on relevance, seller performance, buyer engagement, and listing quality to predict which items are most likely to result in successful sales

title: eBay Cassini SEO Tips for Higher Rankings
notes: Default ranking system that orders search results using Cassini algorithm data to show listings most likely to generate sales based on multiple performance signals

title: All about bidding | eBay
notes: Button feature on auction listings allowing buyers to place bids with automatic bidding system that incrementally bids on their behalf up to maximum amount entered

title: Bid Shielding On Ebay
notes: Prohibited practice where buyers use multiple accounts to place artificially high bids near auction end and retract them at last moment to win at lower price, resulting in account suspension

title: Automatic bidding | eBay
notes: Proxy bidding system where buyers enter maximum amount and eBay automatically places incremental bids on their behalf up to that limit, with bids being binding contracts

title: My eBay - Bids & offers
notes: My eBay section tracking current bids on auction items, lost bids, and Best Offer submissions, with distinction that bids are binding while Best Offers are negotiable

title: eBay Biometric Information Privacy Policy
notes: Passkeys authentication using fingerprint, Face ID, Touch ID, pattern, or PIN for account login, with biometric data never shared with eBay and stored only on user's device

title: Blocking a buyer on eBay
notes: Seller tool allowing blocking up to 5,000 specific buyer usernames from bidding or purchasing, with buyer management features for setting requirements based on location, payment history, and feedback

title: Listing upgrades | eBay Developers Program
notes: Optional paid listing upgrade that displays title in bold font in search results and category listings to make listings stand out, charged per insertion and nonrefundable

title: eBay Listing Upgrades: Which Ones Are Worth It?
notes: Listing upgrade feature that bolds listing title in search results, most valuable in heavily saturated categories where visual differentiation can earn clicks

title: Bons Plans: high-tech, maison, jardin, pièces auto, et bien plus | eBay
notes: eBay France deals section featuring daily deals, trending items, and category-specific promotions with discounts ranging 19-40% across high-tech, home, garden, and automotive categories

title: Analyzing seller performance | eBay Developers Program
notes: Analytics metric tracked through seller performance dashboard, though eBay primarily focuses on transaction-based metrics (defect rates, late shipments) rather than traditional web bounce rates

title: eBay Store Branding: Proven Strategies To Grow Sales For 2026
notes: Seller branding features including customizable store names, logos, billboards, and store descriptions to create professional, consistent identity distinguishing sellers from competitors

title: How to customize your eBay Store
notes: Store naming and customization feature where sellers can align store name with brand identity, keep it under 15 characters, and use consistent branding across store elements

title: eBay bulk listing tools
notes: International version of bulk listing tools supporting CSV/XLS uploads across eBay's global marketplaces via Seller Hub Reports

title: eBay bulk listing tools | Seller Center
notes: Tools for managing up to 2,000 listings including Seller Hub Reports (CSV/XLS uploads up to 30,000 listings), Merchant Integration Platform, and APIs for bulk product management

title: Bulk listing tools | eBay
notes: CSV and XLS file upload system via Seller Hub Reports that processes over 50,000 SKUs in 30 minutes, supporting bulk creation, revision, and relisting of inventory

title: Selling with Buy It Now | eBay
notes: Search filter for finding fixed-price instant purchase listings where buyers can complete purchase immediately without bidding, with optional immediate payment requirement

title: eBay launches 'Certified Recycled Portal'
notes: Automotive parts program with 81 VRA-certified recycled sellers offering used car parts up to 70% cheaper than OEM, with 12-month warranty on body parts and 3-month on mechanical, saving 16,000 tonnes CO2e in 2022

title: Circular Economy | eBay Main Street
notes: Sustainability program for end-of-life vehicle parts from Vehicle Recyclers Association certified businesses subject to annual audits, with all parts traceable, tested and graded

title: The Lowdown on Classified Ads on eBay
notes: Listing format in select categories with $9.95 insertion fee for 30-day listings, default local pickup, off-platform transactions, no final value fees, ideal for large items like vehicles and furniture

title: How do I clear 'Recent Searches' in the eBay search bar
notes: Feature allowing users to reset search filters and clear recent searches via 'CLEAR ALL SEARCHES' link in mobile app or 'x' buttons on desktop browser

title: eBay.co.uk – fulfilment on eBay
notes: UK service with 3,500+ collection points including CollectPlus, Argos, Sainsbury's, InPost, and EVRi for buyers to pick up parcels, with items under 15kg and 90cm max dimension, 7-day hold period

title: Buying with Click & Collect | eBay
notes: International version of Click & Collect pickup service available across eBay's global marketplaces with local collection point networks

title: Click & Collect Delivery | UK Seller Centre
notes: Seller-facing Click & Collect service allowing offer of pickup options at over 3,500 UK locations with same cost as home delivery and free for most items
